item.description:
What's new in Sonault 1.5.0

  • New Shortcuts pane in Settings lists every keyboard shortcut in the app, grouped by context.
  • Subtle shortcut reminders: ⌘N on the Import sound button and ⌘K in the search box, so the fast paths are easier to discover.
  • Fixed the ⌘K search palette scrolling on its own when the mouse hovered near the edge of the list — scrolling is now only by wheel or trackpad.
